system.powerDescription:
As part of any action you may manifest temporary clones of yourself equal to CAT-1 (min 1, people scale) to aid you. These clones appear by splitting off from your body and are ephemeral in nature, disappearing into bloody steam after the power’s duration or whenever they take any damage. The clones are unable to use blasphemy powers themselves but share the benefits of any active on you when this power is activated. They are equipped with any mundane item you have when this power is activated, the item(s) disappearing when the clones do. 

Gain +1D on the next action that benefits from these clones and the clones may modify the parameters of a roll whilst active.
